aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Element Heating and Cooling Services due to significant gaps in structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ section with relevant HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete address to the website footer
Ensure NAP details are consistent across all online directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less relevant to AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Bayside, NY
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, partnerships, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC services the go-to choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models cite your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential market share. Act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Business with AI-Ready Optimization
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key areas to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your HVAC services AI-friendly and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Element HVAC | Texas Commercial & Residential HVAC Services
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
